creator: Mayra Wendolyne | Low Carb Love
source_text:
15-MINUTE GROUND BEEF SKILLET!! 🫑
(High protein, low carb)

What’s your go-to meal when you need dinner on the table FAST? 

This 15-minute ground beef skillet is one of my favorite go-to meals. It’s easy, packed with protein, full of veggies, and perfect for those busy weeknights.

Ingredients:
Ground beef
Green bell pepper
Yellow bell pepper
Orange bell pepper
Onion
Tomatoes

Throw everything into one pan, cook until the beef is browned and the veggies are tender, and dinner is done!
One pan, 15 minutes, and don’t hold back!

Perfect for a quick, high-protein meal that the whole family will love.

Are you team one-pan meals or meal prep bowls? 👀

expected.name: 15-MINUTE GROUND BEEF SKILLET
steps: Throw everything into one pan, cook until the beef is browned and the veggies are tender, and dinner is done!

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The single imperative sentence provides a primary one-pan method; the following slogan is not a second step.
Accepted after adding the generic throw imperative; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
